---
title: "Updating My Notebook"
author: Shama Hasan
date: 2026-03-01
categories: [guidelines]
description: "How to update my notebook!"
image: ""
---

# Step-by-Step

### Step 1: Prepare terminal

i. Terminal > conda activate quarto
ii. cd Desktop
iii. cd XLab_AP
iv. cd Lab_Notebook_Peronal_Site 

Shortcut: "cd Desk" tab autofills the rest of the folder name

### Step 2: Edit Post

i. Open Lab_Notebook_Peronal_Site folder in VS Code 
ii. Edit or create .qmd file under "posts" subfolder
iii. Save file 

### Step 3: Upload

i. Terminal > quarto render
ii. GitHub > Code > Add file > Upload files 
iii. Upload "posts" and "docs" subfolders 
iv. Add descriptive note (i.e. "Updating Notebook Post") > Commit changes
v. Wait until commit has fully loaded and has a check mark

Note: different method due to inabililty to install git 

### Step 4: Access Website

i. GitHub > Settings > Pages 
ii. Click link to website
